reason: The monthly 8h mark-price archives have eight complete missing UTC days, while the five missing daily trade-bar dates are already present in mark-price history. Reusing the trade-bar fill dates would create duplicate mark bars.
change: Use official daily markPriceKlines only for 2021-07-01, 2021-07-24 through 2021-07-27, 2022-10-02, 2023-02-24, and 2026-06-29; do not include any other daily mark archive in the manifest.
